subcodes.first_line: Thy mention was remembered before the Countenance, and attained unto the gaze of the Lord of the Manifestation. From God, exalted and mighty be He, thou didst seek steadfastness [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکرت لدی الوجه مذکور و بلحاظ مالک ظهور فائز گشت از حق جل و عز استقامت خواستی
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @suffering and imprisonment
